text:
is a secondary protagonist of the Spoof on Titan manga. She is a Survey Corps soldier and former member of the 104th Training Corps.

Appearance

Mikasa is of partial Asian heritage, with pale skin, gray eyes, and shoulder-length shaggy black hair. She is frequently seen wearing a white dress underneath a cardigan with a black scarf wrapped around her neck. Mikasa would also wear the standard Training Corps uniform.

In an alternate timeline, she wears a black business attire.
